rulings.Case Title: LEONA T. FONG VS. SERGIO SILVA LAINEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Andm Otion For Attorneys Fees And Costs; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 16, 2011, line 1. Defendants Sergio Lainez, Magaly Silva, Sergio Silva and Priscilla Silva's Motion for Attorney Fees and Costs. Grant attorney fees to moving party in the amount of $20,095.45. Defendants correctly point out Unlawful Detainer based and on contract incorporated etc. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK VS. SHAUN MICHAEL CROWDER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 16, 2011, line 2. Defendants Shaun Crowder and Jeffrey Staulcup's Motion to be Declared Prevailing Party and for Reasonable Attorney's Fees. Grant motion. Defendants are deemed prevailing parties and the court awards reasonable attorney's fees in the amount of $5980.00. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN VS. PHYLLIS TRAMEL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 16, 2011, line 3. Defendants Louis Williams and Phyllis Trammel's Demurrer to Complaint. Overruled, five days to answer. Defendants reading of C.C.P. 1161.(4) is rather novel and not supported by language of the statute or case law. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continiue Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 16, 2011, line 4. Defendant Britney Duquette's Motion to Continue Trial. Grant, subject to opposition and condition that defendant pay rent of $326.62, per diem for 14 days. = (501/REQ)
